meta.title: Hourly Mathle puzzle, a fresh arithmetic Wordle every hour
meta.description: Play Hourly Mathle for a new addition or subtraction puzzle every hour. Five guesses, fast feedback, and a fresh challenge all day.
seo.heading: Hourly Mathle
seo.intro: Hourly Mathle adds a new arithmetic puzzle every hour. It keeps the same five-guess equation challenge, but refreshes more often than the daily game.
seo.feature: The Hourly mode is fixed by your browser's local date and hour. Each hour has its own deterministic puzzle from the three-year schedule.
seo.rhythm: Use Hourly mode when you want more than one challenge in a day without switching to unlimited practice.
